title: Rep. Auchincloss Calls for Clear Rationale on Iran
description: Rep. Jake Auchincloss, a Massachusetts Marine Corps veteran, emphasized the importance of clear communication and defined objectives from the president regarding military actions. He speaks with David Gura and Christina Ruffini on "This Weekend." (Source: Bloomberg)
